text:
13. Before parting, we would also like to note that observations made 
by this Court in the present order are only limited to the issue of 
directing CBI investigation and these observations must not affect 
the investigation in any way which has to be done by the police in 
relation to FIR No.215/2022 at P.S Sector 20, Panchkula (Haryana) 
in a fair and just manner.
14. Pending application(s), if any, stand(s) disposed of.
Result of the case: Appeal allowed.
†
